what: num_kv_splits A/B — flash-decode grid = batch(1) x head-groups(2) x num_kv_splits; AMD path hard-set num_kv_splits=16 (server_args _handle_amd_specifics). Static override sweep, decode attention (_fwd_grouped) isolated, vs 1280 GB/s 2-card KV-read roofline (KV/token @255K = 12.53 GB).
finding: Raising num_kv_splits 16->64 makes 256K decode attention 2.4x faster (46.4->19.3 ms; 21->51% roofline). The upstream AMD hard-cap of 16 under-fills gfx1201's 64 CUs. Knee ~48-64 (128 blocks = 2x CU). Fix: raise / CU-adapt the AMD num_kv_splits default. Pending: end-to-end tok/s A/B + short-ctx no-regression check.
